Rotation

Keep allies alive with steady healing and timely recovery buttons in single target.

Core Loop

  1. Keep Cycle of Rebirth, Extraction, and Lifeblood active before moving into your damage loop.
  2. Use Enduring Exoskeleton, Extraction, and Fury of Anub'Rekhan as your repeatable builder or main filler.

Opener and Setup

  1. Open with Advisor's Perfidy to set up the pull.
  2. Open with Alkahest to set up the pull.

Cooldowns

  1. Use Advisor's Perfidy during your main damage or recovery window.
  2. Use Alkahest during your main damage or recovery window.
  3. Use Ambush Predator during your main damage or recovery window.
  4. Use Avatar of Shadra during your main damage or recovery window.
  5. Use Bountiful Gifts during your main damage or recovery window.
  6. Use Cycle of Rebirth during your main damage or recovery window.
  7. Use Envenomed Weapons during your main damage or recovery window.
  8. Use Extraction during your main damage or recovery window.
  9. Use Fangbinder during your main damage or recovery window.
  10. Use Green Salve during your main damage or recovery window.
  11. Use Lifeblood during your main damage or recovery window.
  12. Use Melioration during your main damage or recovery window.
  13. Use Mending Mist during your main damage or recovery window.
  14. Use Mycelial Healing during your main damage or recovery window.
  15. Use Ophidian Renewal during your main damage or recovery window.
  16. Use Playing With Poison during your main damage or recovery window.
  17. Use Relentless during your main damage or recovery window.
  18. Use Sage during your main damage or recovery window.
  19. Use Serpent Lord's Ritual during your main damage or recovery window.
  20. Use Shadra's Presence during your main damage or recovery window.
  21. Use Soothing Venoms during your main damage or recovery window.
  22. Use Sublime Extraction during your main damage or recovery window.
  23. Use Tome of Ahn'kahet during your main damage or recovery window.
  24. Use Toxic Communion during your main damage or recovery window.
  25. Use Tranquil Essence during your main damage or recovery window.
  26. Use Venom Glands during your main damage or recovery window.
  27. Use Venomcult Scrolls during your main damage or recovery window.

Resource Rule: Use Enduring Exoskeleton, Extraction, and Fury of Anub'Rekhan as your stable repeatable action.

Maintenance Rule: Refresh Cycle of Rebirth, Extraction, and Lifeblood before it falls off.

medium rotation reliability
